---
title: use-waitgroup-go
description: "Prefer WaitGroup.Go."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Prefer WaitGroup.Go. Strider default: Go 1.25 and newer.

## Bad

```go
group.Add(1)
go func() { defer group.Done(); work() }()
```

## Good

```go
group.Go(func() { work() })
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only use-waitgroup-go`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
